Uses of Interface
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.metrics.MetricsRecorder

Packages that use MetricsRecorder
Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.metrics
Metrics SPI for juneau-rest-server — per-request observability hook backed by a caller-supplied MetricsRecorder bean.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.metrics.micrometer
Micrometer bridge for the juneau-rest-server MetricsRecorder SPI.
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.observation
Explicit programmatic observation API for juneau-rest-server — custom (non-request) metrics + tracing around an arbitrary block of work.

  • Uses of MetricsRecorder in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.metrics

    Classes in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.metrics that implement MetricsRecorder
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    final class 
    NoOpMetricsRecorder
    Default MetricsRecorder implementation that drops every event on the floor.

  • Uses of MetricsRecorder in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.metrics.micrometer

    Classes in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.metrics.micrometer that implement MetricsRecorder
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    MicrometerMetricsRecorder
    MetricsRecorder bridge that records every @RestOp call as a Micrometer Timer sample on the configured MeterRegistry.

  • Uses of MetricsRecorder in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.observation
